member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.IMergeable
member.summary: Provides an EntityIdentifier for correlation when merging changes.

member.name: P:ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.IMergeable.EntityIdentifier
member.summary: Identifier used for correlation with MergeChanges.

member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable
member.summary: Interface implemented by entities that are change-tracked.

member.name: P:ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable.ModifiedProperties
member.summary: Properties on an entity that have been modified.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.TrackingState.Unchanged
member.summary: Existing entity that has not been modified.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.TrackingState.Modified
member.summary: Existing entity that has been modified.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.TrackingState.Deleted
member.summary: Existing entity that has been marked as deleted.
